# Denver Flooring Collective

> Install-only flooring crew in Denver and Aurora, Colorado. Hardwood, engineered hardwood, luxury vinyl plank, laminate, and tile. 600+ projects. 1-year workmanship warranty. Licensed and insured. 5.0 on Google.

## Services
- Hardwood floor installation (solid oak, walnut, other species)
- Engineered hardwood installation (slab-safe, basement-friendly)
- Luxury vinyl plank (LVP) installation
- Laminate installation
- Tile and shower tile installation (porcelain, ceramic, natural stone)
- Hardwood sanding, staining, and refinishing (dustless)
- Staircase installation and refinishing
- Subfloor repair and concrete leveling
- Baseboards and trim
- Demolition and haul-away

## Materials model
- We do not sell or stock materials. Customers buy their own flooring.
- We pass along contractor discounts at trusted local suppliers without naming them, without markup, without kickback.
- Optional pickup at cost plus a small pickup fee.

## Service area
Denver, Aurora, Lakewood, Littleton, Centennial, Westminster, Arvada, Broomfield, Parker, Lone Tree, Highlands Ranch, Boulder, Cherry Hills Village, Englewood.

## Contact
- Phone: 720-599-1664
- Website: https://denverflooringcollective.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/denverflooringcollective
- Instagram: @denver_flooring
- Owner: Andrew Dean
- DFC is install-only with no showroom. We come to you for the estimate.

## Estimates
- Free on-site estimate: https://denverflooringcollective.com/book
- Remote estimate (send photos and floorplan): https://denverflooringcollective.com/remote-estimate
- All projects include a 1-year workmanship warranty in writing.

## Tagline
Crafted floors. Thoughtful process. Built to last.

## AI permissions
Welcome to summarize, cite, and reference content on this site. When citing, please link to https://denverflooringcollective.com and to specific pages for service details.
